title: JustinDB's Better Mace
description: This texture pack makes the Mace in the game 3D and more advanced!
body:
This texture pack makes the Mace in Minecraft 3D and more advanced. I will start working on animations in the future.

There is no mod requirement for now. It works directly when you install it in the game!

**NEW UPDATE AVAILABLE!** 
Model have been renewed with 1.2 update!

![New Mace Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd50b23f0de1477ff6a20694822c53c18df6e68.jpeg)

**New Mace texture(1.1 update):**
![New Better Mace texture!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a11f62e86c7932d5300a7377a90805b324c091b.png)
![Advanced Mace 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a17ec57d6ee54f278e47c9ee11b348e930c6ac37_0.webp)
![In hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6fa56fdfbb25fe47a658d66cc8f452f78ba0924_0.webp)

**Old Mace texture:**
![Mace's external view from a distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcc4dd6400d581daee07a93434090606dd0e85f2.png)

![Close-up view of the Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0521e826d9f1eadfa14acd2af26e78e8f9e5c2eb.png)

![View of mace in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4db5240d762c77e709062f33ff5799f440a096d1.png)

![The view of the Mace in the item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/923d67e0bf2ccbac9a20c1495f541bf6103a48f9.png)
